Create a typed KV tier over an optional Node SQLite backend.

## Import

```ts
import { sqliteKv } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Signature

```ts
function sqliteKv(
	path: string,
	opts: SqliteKvOptions<T> = {},
): KvStorageTier<T> & { close(): void }
```
